description: Pre-built textarea + toolbar (bold/italic/heading/list/link/code), live markdown preview, and Prism.js syntax-highlighting recipe. Drop in HTML + CSS + tiny JS for the textarea-toolbar wiring; pull Prism via CDN only when syntax highlighting is needed. Lets the model build editing surfaces without re-implementing toolbar logic that breaks on text-selection edge cases.

textarea.purpose: Source of truth for the editor

license: Original CSS + JS patterns, ISC-equivalent. Marked.js (MIT) and Prism.js (MIT) are external CDN deps.
